policy.description: Policy contains the policy OCI name

config.description: Config contains a list of Updatecli config file path

values.description: Values contains a list of Updatecli config file path

valuesinline.description:
ValuesInline contains a list of inline values for Updatecli config
A deep merge will be performed between global inline values and policy inline values if both are defined.

Example:
  key1: value1
  key2: value2

secrets.description: Secrets contains a list of Updatecli secret file path

policies.description: Policies contains a list of policies

environments.description:
Environment contains a list of environment variables

Example:
  ENV_VAR1: value1
  ENV_VAR2: value2

env_files.description:
Env_files contains a list of environment files

Example:
  - env_file1.env
  - env_file2.env

valuesinline.description:
ValuesInline contains a list of inline values for Updatecli config
This is the default inline values that will be applied to all policies if not overridden by the policy inline values.
A deep merge will be performed between global inline values and policy inline values if both are defined.

Example:
  key1: value1
  key2: value2

include.description: Include contains a list of compose files to include
